title: LSMADLH Forever
description: A fan-made modpack inspired by Alexelcapo's modded series. It is up to date with all the mods he is currently using.
body:
# Spanish
Este es un modpack hecho por mi, un fan de Alexelcapo inspirado en la serie LSMADLH Forever.
Hice este modpack para jugarlo con unos amigos y compartir la misma experiencia que juega Alex, además lo pongo en público por si a alguien le interesa.
Incluye todos los mods que usa de forma activa en la serie.
Si falta algún mod o algo, me podéis contactar y lo añadiré.
Gracias.

# English
This is a modpack made by me, a fan of Alexelcapo, inspired by the series LSMADLH Forever.
It includes all the mods he is actively using in the series.
I made this modpack to play with some friends and share the same experience that Alex is playing, I’m making it public in case anyone else is interested.
If any mod is missing or something needs to be added, you can contact me and I will include it.
Thank you.
